Albion.description: Large, firm, and beautifully sweet with bright strawberry flavour. A versatile berry that shines in fresh desserts, salads, preserves, and paired with cream, chocolate, or balsamic.

Alkindus Pelleted Organic.description: A deep red romaine with crisp texture and mild, slightly sweet flavour. Excellent in salads with citrus, nuts, grilled chicken, feta, and robust vinaigrettes.

Amaze.description: Fresh, mild, and crisp with strong visual appeal. A versatile lettuce that works well with herbs, berries, citrus, grilled vegetables, chicken, and seafood.

Astro Arugula.description: Bright, peppery, and lively with a fresh kick. Perfect with lemon, parmesan, tomato, prosciutto, grilled meats, and roasted vegetables.

Better Boy.description: Classic, full-bodied tomato flavour with a balanced sweetness and firm, juicy flesh. Ideal sliced for sandwiches, burgers, fresh salads, and paired with basil, mozzarella, or olive oil.

Bibb Butterhead.description: Velvety, tender, and mildly sweet with a soft, delicate bite. Ideal for elegant salads with herbs, eggs, seafood, and spring vegetables.

Brandywine.description: Rich, complex heirloom flavour with deep sweetness and a meaty, succulent texture. A standout for caprese, open-faced sandwiches, and pairing with aged cheeses, olive oil, and fresh herbs.

Breen Pelleted Organic.description: Rich red colour with a mild, balanced flavour and soft texture. Pairs well with goat cheese, apples, beets, nuts, and vinaigrettes.

Brentwood Eazyleaf Organic.description: Bright green oak-leaf lettuce with a mild, buttery flavour and tender texture. Perfect for mixed salads with fresh herbs, cucumber, radish, and light citrus dressings.

Burgandy Eazyleaf Organic.description: Striking deep burgundy leaves with a mild, slightly sweet flavour and delicate crunch. Beautiful in salads with pear, walnuts, blue cheese, and balsamic vinaigrette.

Buttercrunch Lettuce.description: Soft, sweet leaves with a gentle crispness through the ribs. Versatile and fresh, it pairs well with citrus, avocado, herbs, seafood, and creamy dressings.

Celebrity.description: Smooth, well-rounded flavour with a gentle sweetness and reliable firmness. A dependable all-purpose tomato for salads, salsas, sauces, and everyday cooking.

Chandler.description: Sweet, juicy, and generously sized with classic strawberry flavour. Wonderful for fresh eating, shortcakes, tarts, smoothies, and pairing with whipped cream or mint.

Chervil.description: Subtle and refined with delicate notes of anise and parsley. A French kitchen essential that elevates eggs, cream sauces, spring vegetables, fish, and chilled soups.

Common Thyme.description: Warm, earthy, and gently aromatic with savoury depth. Indispensable in roasts, stews, grilled meats, mushrooms, root vegetables, and fresh bread.

Dill Bouquet.description: Bright, grassy, and fresh with a gentle anise finish. Pairs beautifully with salmon, cucumber, potatoes, yogurt sauces, pickles, and Scandinavian dishes.

Eazyleaf Blend Organic.description: A thoughtfully curated blend of oak-leaf lettuces offering a range of colour, texture, and mild flavour. Ready for salads with any topping, from grilled proteins to fresh fruit and cheese.

Escarole Batavian.description: Broad, sturdy leaves with a pleasantly mild bitterness that softens when cooked. Excellent in Italian wedding soup, white bean dishes, sauteed with garlic, or raw in hearty winter salads.

Eversweet.description: Reliably sweet and aromatic with a soft, succulent texture. A wonderful everbearing berry for fresh eating, fruit salads, preserves, and pairing with cream or meringue.

Fort Laramie.description: Hardy and sweet with a bright, clean strawberry flavour and juicy texture. Great for fresh snacking, smoothies, desserts, and topping cereals or yogurt.

French Tarragon.description: Elegant and aromatic with a distinctive anise-licorice warmth. A cornerstone of French cuisine, perfect with chicken, fish, eggs, cream sauces, and mustard vinaigrettes.

Fris\u00e9e Endive.description: Lacy, curly leaves with a pleasantly bitter edge and light crunch. A classic in French bistro salads with lardons, poached egg, Dijon, and warm vinaigrettes.

Genovese Basil.description: Sweet, aromatic, and full-flavoured with classic notes of clove and anise. Tender green leaves pair beautifully with tomato, mozzarella, pasta, citrus, and Mediterranean dishes.

Purple Basil.description: Aromatic and deeply flavoured with bold clove and anise notes. Striking dark-purple leaves pair beautifully with heirloom tomato, burrata, stone fruits, cocktails, and fresh herb salads.

Spicy Mix.description: Bold and peppery with layered heat from arugula, mizuna, mustard, and radicchio. Pairs well with strong cheeses, charcuterie, roasted beets, grilled proteins, and assertive vinaigrettes.

Spring Mix.description: Tender and mild with a fresh, delicate bite. A versatile base that pairs effortlessly with fresh fruit, nuts, soft cheeses, citrus vinaigrettes, and light proteins.

Greek Oregano.description: Bold, warm, and intensely aromatic with a peppery bite. Essential for Greek salads, grilled lamb, roasted vegetables, pizza, marinades, and Mediterranean cooking.

Hampton Eazyleaf Organic.description: Bright green leaves with a clean, mild flavour and satisfying crunch. A reliable everyday lettuce for wraps, sandwiches, side salads, and pairing with a wide range of dressings.

Heatmaster F1.description: Robust and full-flavoured with dependable firmness and rich tomato taste. Well-suited for grilling, roasting, fresh slicing, and pairing with herbs, garlic, and olive oil.

Ilema Organic.description: Crisp and refreshing with a clean, mild flavour and dense, satisfying crunch. Ideal for Caesar-style salads, wraps, burgers, and pairing with bold dressings and grilled proteins.

Italian Parsley.description: Clean, bright, and slightly peppery with a fresh, grassy finish. A kitchen staple for sauces, salads, tabbouleh, grilled meats, seafood, and finishing almost any savoury dish.

Jewel.description: Firm, richly coloured, and deeply flavoured with classic sweetness. Excellent for fresh eating, pies, preserves, and pairing with chocolate, mint, or vanilla cream.

KX-1 Kale (baby leaf).description: Tender, mild, and nutrient-dense with none of the toughness of mature kale. Delicious raw in salads with lemon, olive oil, parmesan, nuts, dried fruit, and grain bowls.

Kentucky Colonel Spearmint.description: Cool, sweet, and refreshing with a clean, bright aroma. Perfect for teas, cocktails, fruit salads, lamb dishes, yogurt sauces, and fresh spring rolls.

Komatsuna Mustard Spinach.description: Mild, tender leaves with a subtle mustard warmth and spinach-like versatility. Wonderful in stir-fries, miso soup, noodle bowls, salads, and sauteed with garlic and sesame.

Lemon Balm.description: Bright, gentle lemon fragrance with a sweet, calming flavour. Lovely in teas, lemonades, fruit desserts, salad dressings, fish dishes, and infused waters.

Little Gem.description: Compact, sweet, and satisfyingly crunchy with the best qualities of romaine and butterhead. Ideal halved and grilled, in Caesar salads, or with anchovies, parmesan, and lemon.

Lovage.description: Bold, complex celery-like flavour with an earthy, slightly peppery depth. Excellent in soups, stocks, potato dishes, stews, and as an aromatic garnish for savoury plates.

Magenta Sunset Swiss Chard.description: Bold in colour and earthy in flavour, with tender leaves and crisp, colourful stems. Excellent with garlic, lemon, olive oil, grains, legumes, and aged cheeses.

Mara de Bois.description: Intensely aromatic with complex wild-strawberry fragrance and a rich, honeyed sweetness. A gourmet favourite for fresh eating, elegant desserts, and pairing with champagne or cream.

Marjoram.description: Sweet, delicate, and gently floral with a milder warmth than oregano. Lovely with roasted poultry, sausages, root vegetables, eggs, butter sauces, and Mediterranean dishes.

Mei Qing Pak Choi.description: Crisp, mild, and subtly sweet with juicy stems and tender leaves. Excellent stir-fried, steamed, in ramen, with ginger and soy, sesame oil, and Asian-inspired dishes.

Microgreen Arugula.description: Concentrated peppery punch in a tiny, vibrant leaf. Perfect for finishing pizzas, pasta, sandwiches, eggs, charcuterie boards, and adding bold flavour to any plate.

Microgreen Basil.description: Intense basil aroma and flavour in a delicate, miniature form. Beautiful as a garnish for caprese, bruschetta, Thai dishes, cocktails, and fresh summer plates.

Microgreen Beet.description: Earthy, sweet, and strikingly coloured with deep ruby stems. Adds vibrant colour and flavour to salads, grain bowls, goat cheese dishes, and elegant plating.

Microgreen Broccoli Organic.description: Mild, fresh, and subtly peppery with remarkable nutritional density. A versatile garnish for soups, sandwiches, smoothie bowls, wraps, and health-focused dishes.

Microgreen Kale.description: Tender and mild with a gentle earthiness, far softer than mature kale. Ideal for smoothie bowls, avocado toast, grain salads, and adding subtle green depth to any dish.

Microgreen Kohlrabi.description: Crisp and mild with a delicate cabbage-like sweetness. A refined garnish for seafood, Asian-inspired dishes, tacos, spring rolls, and light salads.

Microgreen Pac Choi.description: Fresh, mild, and slightly tangy with tender stems and bright green leaves. Lovely on noodle bowls, dumplings, sushi, stir-fries, and Asian-fusion plates.

Microgreen Pea Shoots.description: Sweet, fresh, and unmistakably pea-flavoured with tender curling tendrils. Wonderful in salads, on toast, with spring vegetables, seafood, risotto, and as an elegant garnish.

Microgreen Radish Organic.description: Spicy, zesty, and vibrant with a satisfying crunch and peppery heat. Perfect for tacos, sushi, sandwiches, avocado dishes, and adding a bright kick to any plate.

Microgreen Sunflower Organic.description: Nutty, crunchy, and mildly sweet with substantial, satisfying leaves. Excellent in salads, wraps, smoothie bowls, grain dishes, and as a hearty garnish for soups.

Microgreen Swiss Chard.description: Earthy, mild, and beautifully colourful with delicate ruby and gold stems. A stunning garnish for fine dining plates, salads, appetizers, and grain bowls.

Mizuna Mustard Greens.description: Feathery, delicate leaves with a mild peppery bite and fresh, clean finish. Beautiful in Japanese-inspired salads, stir-fries, noodle bowls, and paired with sesame, miso, and citrus.

Monterey.description: Large, sweet, and generously juicy with a bright, appealing flavour. Wonderful for fresh eating, fruit platters, smoothies, tarts, and pairing with whipped cream or chocolate.

Newham Pelleted Organic.description: Compact and crisp with a sweet, mild flavour and satisfying crunch. Perfect for mini Caesar salads, grilled lettuce wedges, wraps, and pairing with bold, creamy dressings.

Ozark Beauty.description: Sweet, aromatic, and reliably productive with a well-balanced berry flavour. Great for fresh eating, freezing, desserts, and pairing with vanilla, mint, or citrus.

Rosemary.description: Pine-scented, woody, and deeply aromatic with a warm, resinous intensity. Essential for roasted lamb, focaccia, potatoes, grilled vegetables, olive oil infusions, and hearty Mediterranean dishes.

Sage.description: Warm, earthy, and softly peppery with a velvety texture and savoury depth. Perfect with brown butter, pork, poultry, squash, stuffing, pasta, and autumn dishes.

Salad Bowl Oakleaf.description: Delicate and tender with a mild, slightly nutty flavour. A refined choice for salads with soft cheeses, fruit, herbs, and light vinaigrettes.

San Marzano-.description: Dense, meaty, and rich with low acidity and a deep, sweet tomato flavour. The gold standard for sauces, slow-cooked ragus, pizza, bruschetta, and Italian cooking.

Seascape.description: Firm, sweet, and brightly flavoured with a pleasing balance of tartness. Excellent for fresh eating, dipping in chocolate, topping pancakes, and pairing with citrus or cream.

Seaside F1 Spinach (baby leaf).description: Tender, mild, and subtly sweet with smooth, dark green leaves. Essential for fresh salads, smoothies, sauteed with garlic, eggs, pasta, and grain bowls.

Sequoia.description: Extra sweet, soft, and richly aromatic with a delicate, melt-in-your-mouth texture. Best enjoyed fresh, in fruit salads, with angel food cake, or alongside whipped cream and berries.

Sorrel.description: Bright, tangy, and refreshingly lemony with a unique sharp flavour. Wonderful in French-style soups, cream sauces, fish dishes, spring salads, and paired with eggs or potatoes.

Spretnak Organic.description: Beautiful red-tinged butterhead with velvety, tender leaves and a mild, sweet flavour. Lovely in composed salads with fresh herbs, radish, avocado, and delicate vinaigrettes.

Sprout Adzuki Bean Organic.description: Nutty, slightly sweet, and satisfyingly crunchy with a subtle earthy depth. Excellent in Asian stir-fries, salads, grain bowls, wraps, and paired with soy, ginger, and sesame.

Sprout Alfalfa Organic.description: Mild, fresh, and delicately grassy with fine, tender strands. A classic for sandwiches, wraps, salads, spring rolls, and adding light texture to any fresh dish.

Sprout Barley Organic.description: Sweet, malty, and pleasantly chewy with wholesome grain flavour. Great in grain bowls, hearty salads, soups, and paired with roasted vegetables and earthy dressings.

Sprout Bean Salad Mix Organic.description: A hearty blend of sprouted beans with varied textures and mild, earthy flavour. Perfect for protein-rich salads, wraps, stir-fries, and topping soups and grain bowls.

Sprout Broccoli Organic.description: Mild, fresh, and subtly peppery with impressive nutritional value. Ideal for sandwiches, smoothies, salad topping, wraps, and adding a healthful boost to everyday meals.

Sprout Brown Mustard Organic.description: Spicy, bold, and pungent with a satisfying mustard heat. Wonderful on sandwiches, in Asian dishes, with grilled meats, charcuterie, and as a zesty garnish.

Sprout Go Go Mix Organic.description: An energizing blend of sprouted seeds with a lively, varied flavour profile. Great for sandwiches, wraps, salads, smoothie bowls, and quick, nutritious snacking.

Sprout Gourmet Mix Organic.description: A carefully curated mix of premium sprouts offering complex flavour and varied texture. Ideal for fine salads, elegant garnishes, seafood plates, and upscale sandwiches.

Sprout Green Hunter Organic.description: A vibrant green blend of nutrient-rich sprouts with fresh, mild flavour. Perfect for salads, juicing, smoothies, wraps, and adding green vitality to any dish.

Sprout Green Lentils Organic.description: Earthy, hearty, and satisfying with a gentle, nutty flavour. Wonderful in grain bowls, Indian-inspired dishes, hearty salads, soups, and paired with cumin and lemon.

Sprout Green Peas Organic.description: Sweet, fresh, and delightfully crunchy with true pea flavour. Excellent in salads, stir-fries, spring rolls, on toast, and as a crisp, sweet garnish.

Sprout Mung Bean Organic.description: Crisp, mild, and refreshingly clean with a satisfying crunch. A staple for stir-fries, pho, pad thai, bibimbap, spring rolls, and Asian-inspired dishes.

Sprout Radish Organic.description: Zesty, peppery, and bright with a lively kick and crisp texture. Perfect for sushi, tacos, sandwiches, avocado toast, and adding colour and spice to fresh plates.

Sprout Red Clover Organic.description: Mild, slightly sweet, and delicately fresh with fine, tender shoots. Lovely in sandwiches, wraps, smoothies, light salads, and as a gentle, nutritious garnish.

Sprout Salad Mix Organic.description: A fresh, balanced blend of mild and peppery sprouts designed for everyday salads. Ready for any bowl, wrap, or plate that needs a boost of crunch and flavour.

Sprout Sandwich Booster Mix Organic.description: A crunchy, layered mix of sprouts built for adding texture and freshness to sandwiches, wraps, burgers, and any handheld meal.

Sprout Wheatgrass Organic.description: Sweet, vibrant, and deeply green with a fresh, grassy flavour. Ideal for juicing, smoothies, wellness shots, and adding concentrated green nutrition to your routine.

Sprout Yellow Mustard Organic.description: Mildly spicy with a gentle mustard warmth and crisp, juicy stems. Great on sandwiches, in coleslaw, with grilled sausages, and as a tangy salad topping.

Sun Gold.description: Intensely sweet, bright, and bursting with tropical-fruity flavour. An irresistible cherry tomato for fresh snacking, salads, pasta, roasting, and pairing with basil, burrata, or balsamic.

Tatsoi.description: Tender, spoon-shaped leaves with a mild, creamy mustard flavour and buttery texture. Delicious in stir-fries, soups, salads, and paired with soy, ginger, garlic, and sesame.

Thai Basil.description: Spicy, aromatic, and distinctly anise-flavoured with sturdy, beautiful purple-tinged leaves. Essential for Thai curries, pho, stir-fries, spring rolls, and Southeast Asian dishes.

Tribute.description: Firm, bright, and well-balanced with a pleasant tartness alongside natural sweetness. Excellent for fresh eating, jams, cobblers, and pairing with cream, lemon, or honey.

Tristar.description: Small but intensely sweet and aromatic with concentrated strawberry essence. Wonderful for fresh eating, dessert garnishes, fruit sauces, and savouring just as they are.

Tropicana Pelleted Organic.description: Bright green and refreshing with a clean, mild flavour and gentle crunch. A versatile lettuce for everyday salads, sandwiches, tacos, wraps, and light summer meals.

Truchas Pelleted Organic.description: Deep red romaine-type lettuce with a mild, slightly sweet flavour and crisp texture. Beautiful in mixed green salads with beets, walnuts, chevre, and tangy vinaigrettes.

Watercress.description: Crisp, peppery, and refreshingly bright with a clean, slightly tangy bite. Classic in tea sandwiches, soups, salads, and paired with smoked salmon, eggs, citrus, and butter.

Alkindus.description: A deep red romaine with crisp texture and mild, slightly sweet flavour. Excellent in salads with citrus, nuts, grilled chicken, feta, and robust vinaigrettes.
